summary: LeadVibes CRM comprehensive testing completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend features working correctly for both Individual and Agency users. Calendar event creation modal fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing React error - FIXED
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed value="" to value="none" for 'Sin lead' option

passed_tests: Backend: Agency user registration with account_type='agency'
Frontend: Individual dashboard shows 3 stat cards (no Brokers Activos)
Frontend: Individual dashboard has NO Leaderboard section
Frontend: Individual sidebar shows 5 links (no Brokers, no Gamificación)
Frontend: Leads page with Kanban board (6 columns)
Frontend: Drag-and-drop handles visible on lead cards
Frontend: Registration form with account type selector
Frontend: Agency user dashboard shows 4 stat cards (with Brokers Activos)
Frontend: Agency dashboard has Leaderboard section
Frontend: Agency sidebar shows 7 links (with Brokers and Gamificación)
seed_data_creation: Created test leads and calendar events during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Individual vs Agency UI differentiation is working correctly. Individual users see simplified UI (3 stat cards, no Leaderboard, 5 nav items). Agency users see full UI (4 stat cards with Brokers Activos, Leaderboard, 7 nav items including Brokers and Gamificación). Calendar event modal had a SelectItem bug that was fixed. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_leadvibes_crm.py cover auth, dashboard, leads, calendar, gamification, brokers, and scripts.
